creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Simon:

Can you try this  WITHOUT THE PATCH on 7.3+? or a more current version?

There will be no active patches for EOL versions.

You state"

  In freebsd 7.2 reads will always fail with EAGAIN (aka EWOULDBLOCK).
"
if this is true for 7.3, I will try to do what was suggested, and make 
this an option knob.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
